name: Dotcom-Monitor
description: Website, web application and API uptime and synthetic monitoring platform with 30+ global locations.

seo.title: Dotcom-Monitor — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Dotcom-Monitor: Website, web application and API uptime and synthetic monitoring platform with 30+ global locations.

when_to_use: Synthetic uptime checks from 30+ global locations
API endpoint availability and response-time SLAs
Alerting on SSL certificate expiry and DNS failures

pros: Affordable compared to Catchpoint or ThousandEyes
cons: UI dated relative to newer synthetic tools
Scripting editor less polished than Checkly
review.verdict: Reliable legacy synthetic monitoring at fair prices; functional but uninspired compared to modern alternatives.
review.best_for: Teams needing cheap, global synthetic and uptime monitoring with minimal fuss.
review.not_for: Modern dev teams wanting code-first synthetic monitoring like Checkly.
